pi_items.source: Task description instructions explicitly state 'so its width is exactly 1200 pixels'.
Task description instructions explicitly state 'Set the Alternative Text (Alt Text) for 'Sideways Portrait' to exactly: 'Professional headshot restored''.
Task description instructions explicitly state 'Create a new Post titled 'Meet the Team''.

privileged_info_summary: Verified that the expected landscape width (1200), expected portrait alt text ('Professional headshot restored'), and expected post title ('Meet the Team') exactly match the explicit instructions provided in the task description. The task relies on non-synthetic real-world imagery downloaded directly from Wikimedia Commons. However, discovered that the task is defective: the target URL for the John F. Kennedy Official Portrait returns an HTML error page rather than a valid JPEG image, causing the PHP rotation script to fail and resulting in an invalid HTML file being processed as an image. Furthermore, the real dimensions of the downloaded Hopetoun falls landscape image are 3072x2048, which contradicts the setup script's comment claiming it is ~2272px wide.
